message:
refactor: Add h.wrap(), h.passN() helpers; simplify curses, enum, _abc, copy modules

New helpers in mod_helper.zig:
- h.wrap(pre, suf, default) - wraps single arg in prefix/suffix
- h.passN(n, default) - passthrough Nth argument

Replaced local generator functions with helpers:
- curses_mod: genColorPair, genPairNumber → h.wrap()
- enum_mod: genDecorator → h.pass()
- _abc_mod: genReg → h.passN(1, ...)
- copy_mod: genReplace → h.pass()

Total: 7288 → 7263 lines (-25)
